description: Opening lines of a legal document. Dated: Thursday, 1 Shevaṭ 4746 AM = 1297 Seleucid = 14 January 986. Location: Fusṭāṭ. In which Shelomo b. Yiṣḥaq gives testimony to the court. Reused on verso for a poem or sermon in Hebrew, continuing in the right and upper margins. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
